title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.365 - Cemetery failing to provide maintenance — abandonment or ceasing to operate, division's duties
text:
214.365.  Cemetery failing to provide maintenance — abandonment or ceasing to operate, division's duties. — Prior to any action as provided in subsection 2 of section 214.205, and when the division has information that a cemetery is not providing maintenance and care, has been abandoned, or has ceased operation, the division may investigate the cemetery to determine the cemetery's current status.  If the division finds evidence that the cemetery is abandoned, is not conducting business, or is not providing maintenance and care, the division may apply to the circuit court for appointment as receiver, trustee, or successor in trust.
(L. 1961 p. 538 § 14, A.L. 1994 S.B. 496 § 214.360 subsec. 3, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1692, et al. merged with H.B. 2226, et al. merged with S.B. 754)
